scripts.deploy:web: cd src/apps/web && npm ci --workspaces=false && npm run deploy
scripts.deploy:web:preview: cd src/apps/web && npm ci --workspaces=false && npm run deploy
scripts.deploy:server: cd src/apps/server && npm ci --workspaces=false && npm run deploy
scripts.deploy:server:preview: cd src/apps/server && npm ci --workspaces=false && npm run preview
